name: pons-traction-detector
description: On-chain pons launch tracker and early traction detector for Robinhood Chain.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/rpc.js && node --check src/abi.js && node --check src/contracts.js && node --check src/store.js && node --check src/scoring.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/whatsapp.js
